def iscube(a):
    '''
    The function takes an integer a and outputs True whenever a can be represented as the cube of another integer.

    Examples:
    iscube(1) ==> True
    iscube(2) ==> False
    iscube(-1) ==> True
    iscube(64) ==> True
    iscube(0) ==> True
    iscube(180) ==> False
